# Virginia Law Eliminates Breast Cancer Screening Costs

**TL;DR:** Virginia passed a law to cover breast cancer screening expenses, but many residents don't realize they shouldn't be paying medical bills for this care.

Virginia's law eliminates out-of-pocket costs for breast cancer screening, removing a barrier to preventive healthcare. Many patients continue to receive and pay medical bills for screening services despite the law's protections. Residents who have already paid for screenings may be entitled to refunds under this legislation.

**Why it matters:** Chesterfield residents should know this law protects them from screening costs and may be able to reclaim money already paid for breast cancer screenings.

[Read the source at Google News: Virginia Government →](https://news.google.?oc=5)
